script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
USERS="afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily jesusr jose lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid"
MASTER=/home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json
echo '=== sanity check: master is azureuser:azureuser 0600 ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' "$MASTER"
echo '=== migrate each symlinked user to real per-user .claude ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  d=/home/$u/.claude
  if [ -L "$d" ]; then
    target=$(readlink "$d")
    if [ "$target" != "/home/azureuser/.claude" ]; then
      echo "  $u: SKIP (symlink to $target, unexpected)"
      continue
    fi
    unlink "$d"                                                  # remove symlink, NOT target
    mkdir "$d"
    cp -p "$MASTER" "$d/.credentials.json"                       # fresh real copy
    chown -R "$u:$u" "$d"
    chmod 700 "$d"
    chmod 600 "$d/.credentials.json"
    inode=$(stat -c '%i' "$d/.credentials.json")
    echo "  $u: real dir, inode=$inode"
  else
    echo "  $u: not a symlink, skipping"
  fi
done
echo '=== AFTER: structure per user ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  if [ -L /home/$u/.claude ]; then
    echo "  $u: STILL SYMLINK (bad)"
  else
    echo "  $u: $(stat -c '%a %U:%G' /home/$u/.claude) | cred: $(stat -c '%a %U:%G inode=%i' /home/$u/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1)"
  fi
done
echo '=== master inode + owner ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G inode=%i' "$MASTER"
echo '=== mskai still works? ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- head -c 60 "$MASTER" 2>&1
echo
echo '=== aixa can read ITS OWN cred? ==='
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 60 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo
echo '===END==='
